visual_description: A medium shot captures a dimly lit, gritty interior. The scene is set in a dimly lit, possibly industrial or older building. The walls are made of dirty, off-white tiles. On the wall behind the men, two framed pictures hang, and a red diamond-shaped decoration is affixed to a dark door. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot that frames the group's interaction. The audio begins with a man speaking in a calm, slightly questioning tone, as if making an observation. He says, "他们来了" (They're here). In the foreground, a man with dark hair, wearing a black leather jacket over a black shirt, looks off to the right with a serious expression. Behind him, another man in a dark jacket is partially visible. The atmosphere is tense and quiet, with no background music, focusing entirely on the dialogue and the sounds of the characters' movements. A woman with dark hair, wearing a sparkly, patterned jacket, enters the frame from the right, smiling and gesturing with her hands.
